source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
The figure on the right has a perimeter of $42 \mathrm{~cm}$. The figure was made from eight equally sized squares. What is the area of the figure?
<image1>

image_dependency: Question explicitly refers to 'The figure on the right', so the needed shape information is outside the text.
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the problem is primarily visual.
To determine the area from the given perimeter, the arrangement of the eight equal squares must be read from the image; text alone does not specify the layout.
multi_step: Solving requires combining the visual structure of an 8-square figure with the numeric perimeter 42 cm.
A typical solution needs at least two steps: count/identify the figure's boundary in unit square sides, then infer side length and compute total area of 8 squares.
The problem mixes geometry from the image with arithmetic, so it is more than a single direct lookup.
verifiability: answer_type=short_text with a single numeric target ('$72 \\mathrm{~cm}^{2}$') is easy to check.
The item is also multiple-choice with one listed option matching the provided answer, which supports unambiguous evaluation.
registry_passed=true, question_present=true, answer_present=true, and the image asset exists, so the sample is well-formed for downstream verification.

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产均存在，registry_passed=true，且没有登记问题。
图像依赖度高且图像文件可用，样本核心语义支撑完整，适合进入候选池。
multi_step_score 和 verifiability_score 均较高，说明题目有较好的推理价值和可核验性。
risk_flags 为空，当前没有明显质量或安全风险。
